subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward the Countenance! Hearken unto that which the Most Exalted Pen recounteth unto thee on this night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی الوجه ان استمع ما یقص لک القلم الاعلی فی هذه اللیله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
